prompt:
A clean premium food advertisement poster on a light gray-white studio background, featuring tomatoes as the hero subject. In the center, show exactly 7 tomato pieces arranged on a shallow round wooden plate: 5 whole ripe red tomatoes stacked in a natural pyramid, 1 halved tomato standing upright at the front center with glossy flesh and visible seeds, and 1 wedge slice placed at the lower right foreground. The tomatoes are fresh, vivid red, covered with realistic water droplets, with green stems attached to most whole fruits. Add a few green leaves and two small yellow tomato blossoms near the lower right edge for freshness accents. Use soft commercial lighting, gentle shadows, sharp focus, and highly realistic texture, in a polished supermarket-poster style.

Design the layout as a Chinese nutrition and freshness infographic poster. In the upper left, place a large two-line Chinese headline with strong typographic hierarchy: the first line in black reads 自然成熟, the second line in large warm red reads 营养美味. Below it, add a smaller gray Chinese slogan: 每一口都是大自然的馈赠. Under the slogan, place exactly 3 simple red line icons in a horizontal row with short Chinese labels and gray sublabels beneath each: 1) a sun icon with text "充足日照" and subtext "自然成熟", 2) a sprout or leaf icon with text "科学种植" and subtext "健康美味", 3) a heart outline icon with text "新鲜采摘" and subtext "产地直供".

On the right side, create a thin curved red guide line framing the tomatoes, with exactly 4 circular nutrient callouts stacked vertically from top to bottom. Each callout is a red or red-orange gradient circle with a white symbol or letter inside, connected to the curve. Use these Chinese labels and explanatory text: 1) top callout with "C" and title "富含维生素C", description "有助于增强免疫力 促进胶原蛋白合成"; 2) second callout with a molecular icon and title "番茄红素", description "强效抗氧化剂 有助于抵御自由基"; 3) third callout with a leaf icon and title "膳食纤维", description "促进肠道蠕动 帮助消化"; 4) bottom callout with "K" and title "钾元素", description "有助于维持 心脏健康".

On the left lower side of the tomatoes, add exactly 2 red text feature callouts with fine red leader lines: the upper one titled "美味多汁" with smaller gray text "果肉饱满，汁水丰富 酸甜可口，回味无穷"; the lower one titled "新鲜采摘" with smaller gray text "人工精选，严格挑选 确保每一颗都新鲜优质".

Across the bottom, place a rounded rectangular nutrition table bar in white with light gray dividers. On the left end, add a solid red rounded label block containing the Chinese title 营养成分表（每100g含量）. To its right, show exactly 6 nutrient columns with gray headings and darker values beneath: "能量" "20kcal"; "蛋白质" "0.9g"; "脂肪" "0.2g"; "碳水化合物" "4.2g"; "维生素C" "14mg"; "钾" "179mg". Center a tiny gray footnote below the table: "* 数据来源于《中国食物成分表》". Overall style: elegant Chinese fresh-produce marketing poster, balanced whitespace, red-accented infographic design, realistic product photography blended with clean vector UI elements.
